---
title: "National Parks Town, Visitor Centre and Resort Subdivision Designation Regulations"
long_title: "Regulations Respecting the Designation of Towns, Visitor Centres and Resort Subdivisions in National Parks"
instrument_number: "SOR/91-8"
language: "en"
type: "regulation"
---

# National Parks Town, Visitor Centre and Resort Subdivision Designation Regulations

> Regulations Respecting the Designation of Towns, Visitor Centres and Resort Subdivisions in National Parks


## Short Title

### 1

These Regulations may be cited as the *National Parks Town, Visitor Centre and Resort Subdivision Designation Regulations*.

## Surveyed Areas

### 2

The surveyed areas shown on the plans of survey listed in the schedule are designated as towns, visitor centres or resort subdivisions as set out in the schedule.

> His Excellency the Governor General in Council, on the recommendation of the Minister of the Environment, pursuant to subsection 7(1)[^] of the *National Parks Act*, is pleased hereby to revoke the *National Parks Townsite and Subdivision Designation Regulations*, C.R.C., c. 1133, and to make the annexed *Regulations respecting the designation of towns, visitor centres and resort subdivisions in national parks*, in substitution therefor.



## SCHEDULE
